# GitBase<T> class

Namespace: [`Velopack.Sources`](./index.md)

Base class to provide some shared implementation between sources which download releases from a Git repository.

```cs
public abstract class GitBase<T> : IUpdateSource
```

**Implements:** [`IUpdateSource`](./IUpdateSource.md)

### Prerelease {#prerelease}

```cs
public virtual bool Prerelease { get; }
```

If true, the latest upcoming/prerelease release will be downloaded. If false, the latest 
stable release will be downloaded.

### DownloadReleaseEntry(logger, releaseEntry, localFile, progress, cancelToken) {#downloadreleaseentry-ivelopacklogger-velopackasset-string-action-int-cancellationtoken}

```cs
public virtual Task DownloadReleaseEntry(IVelopackLogger logger, VelopackAsset releaseEntry, string localFile, Action<int> progress, CancellationToken cancelToken)
```

Download the specified [`VelopackAsset`](../Velopack/VelopackAsset.md) to the provided local file path.

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `logger` | [`IVelopackLogger`](../Velopack.Logging/IVelopackLogger.md) | The logger to use for any diagnostic messages. |
| `releaseEntry` | [`VelopackAsset`](../Velopack/VelopackAsset.md) | The release to download. |
| `localFile` | `string` | The path on the local disk to store the file. If this file exists,<br/> it will be overwritten. |
| `progress` | `Action<int>` | This delegate will be executed with values from 0-100 as the<br/> download is being processed. |
| `cancelToken` | `CancellationToken` | A token to use to cancel the request. |


**Returns** `Task`

### GetReleaseFeed(logger, appId, channel, stagingId, latestLocalRelease) {#getreleasefeed-ivelopacklogger-string-string-guid-velopackasset}

```cs
public virtual Task<VelopackAssetFeed> GetReleaseFeed(IVelopackLogger logger, string? appId, string channel, Guid? stagingId = null, VelopackAsset? latestLocalRelease = null)
```

Retrieve the list of available remote releases from the package source. These releases
can subsequently be downloaded with `DownloadReleaseEntry`.

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `logger` | [`IVelopackLogger`](../Velopack.Logging/IVelopackLogger.md) | The logger to use for any diagnostic messages. |
| `appId` | `string` |  |
| `channel` | `string` | Release channel to filter packages by. Can be null, which is the <br/> default channel for this operating system. |
| `stagingId` | `Guid?` | A persistent user-id, used for calculating whether a specific<br/> release should be available to this user or not. (eg, for the purposes of rolling out<br/> an update to only a small portion of users at a time). |
| `latestLocalRelease` | [`VelopackAsset`](../Velopack/VelopackAsset.md) | The latest / current local release. If specified,<br/> metadata from this package may be provided to the remote server (such as package id,<br/> or cpu architecture) to ensure that the correct package is downloaded for this user. |


**Returns** `Task<VelopackAssetFeed>` — An array of [`VelopackAsset`](../Velopack/VelopackAsset.md) objects that are available for download
 and are applicable to this user.

### GetAssetUrlFromName(release, assetName) {#getasseturlfromname-t-string}

```cs
protected abstract string GetAssetUrlFromName(T release, string assetName)
```

Given a [`GithubRelease`](./GithubRelease.md) and an asset filename (eg. 'RELEASES') this 
function will return either `BrowserDownloadUrl` or
`Url`, depending whether an access token is available
or not. Throws if the specified release has no matching assets.

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `release` | `T` |  |
| `assetName` | `string` |  |


**Returns** `string`
